header_21.raw_response: I tend to prefer working ahead of deadlines to avoid the stress of last-minute work. My experience in social work has taught me the value of planning and preparation, especially when supporting others. I've had moments where I've fallen into the last-minute habit, but I've learned to prioritize early completion to maintain balance and reduce stress. While I sometimes struggle with time management, I generally aim to complete tasks well before the deadline.
